meanings.definition: rendering an organism sensitive to a serum by a series of injections

examples: He was not sensitized to her emotional needs
She sensitized me with respect to gender differences in this traditional male-dominated society
My tongue became sensitized to good wine

meanings.definition: make sensitive to a drug or allergen
examples: Long-term exposure to this medicine may sensitize you to the allergen

meanings.definition: make (a material) sensitive to light, often of a particular colour, by coating it with a photographic emulsion
making susceptible or sensitive to either physical or emotional stimuli
